queue_item.action: Recover and preserve one high-value language-evolution rule as a privacy-bounded knowledge-graph record while exhaustive queue replay remains blocked.

progress.memory: Feel and think remain separate project operators: qualitative orientation versus analytical judgment.
progress.privacy_boundary: Only an abstract semantic rule and modeling implication were persisted; no verbatim dialogue or personal material was copied.
progress.verification: Artifact will be fetched back from the default branch and parsed as JSON after this queue record is committed.

queue_item.handoff: Continue M-008 when exhaustive recursive tree access becomes available. Independently, extend the language lexicon through additive records for related operators and explicit context exceptions.

claim_state.observed: The project intentionally distinguishes feel-language from think-language.
claim_state.inferred: Collapsing the terms creates semantic and epistemic drift.
claim_state.proposed: Store felt orientation and analytical conclusion as separate typed knowledge-graph nodes.
claim_state.superseded: Using feel and think as stylistic synonyms.
claim_state.unresolved: The complete historical language lexicon and all context-specific exceptions remain unreconstructed.
